form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Bm72 February 5 over 1050m, soft track; 1.2 len behind King Spirit carrying 57kg at $1.90. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 2.5 len this track Cl1-Sw December 18 over 1050m slow track defeating Determination carrying 60kg at $3.60. Looks the key runner.
